channel.title: Frontend on cestduLeon/
channel.description: Recent content in Frontend on cestduLeon/
channel.copyright: How's your thirst for adventure, Captain?

item.title: job-application — a Claude Cowork skill + its landing page
item.description: An open-source Claude skill covering the full job-application cycle, with a handcrafted landing page. Shipped as MIT, five versions in six weeks, responding to real usage instead of a roadmap.

item.title: BOOKMARK, the landing page of an extension
item.description: This is a landing page with a extensions called bookmark. Page implementation with Tailwind
